columns.extraction_plan: The PDF reports "time to clinical progression" which is similar to PFS, but not exactly PFS. Therefore, Median PFS (mo) | Overall | Treatment is not reported.
The PDF reports "time to clinical progression" which is similar to PFS, but not exactly PFS. Therefore, Median PFS (mo) | Overall | Control is not reported.

The PDF reports "time to clinical progression" which is similar to PFS, but not exactly PFS. Also, the PDF does not report PFS specifically for the high volume subgroup. Therefore, Median PFS (mo) | High volume | Treatment is not reported.
